name: PCMFlowOpus
description: Opus codec add-on for PCMFlow, focused on real-time voice (VoIP, ESP-NOW transceivers). Wraps Xiph.Org's libopus and exposes OpusEncoder / OpusDecoder via PCMFlow's PCMSink / PCMSource interfaces. Operates on raw Opus packets; Ogg/Opus container support is deferred.
keywords: audio, opus, codec, voip, esp-now, esp32, pcmflow
